payload.label: dining table
payload.long_description: Dark-stained wooden dining table side with vertical paneled base and a beige tablecloth overhanging the top; crop shows the table's edge and side panels (partial/edge-cropped) with a small white sticker on the right panel, visible cloth fringe and slight scuffing at the base — approximately 1.2 m from the camera.
